summary.key_theme: 儘管面臨內部人士拋售與法律審查的短期壓力，市場對 Reddit 獨特的人類生成數據在 AI 訓練與廣告領域的長期價值仍持高度樂觀態度。

bullish.title: Reddit Starting To Look Straight-Up Attractive At This Price
bullish.reason: 分析指出 Reddit 擁有獨特的人類生成內容數據，對 AI 開發商與廣告商具有極高戰略價值，被視為長期成長的核心驅動力。

bullish.title: Jim Cramer on Reddit (RDDT): “I Want to Buy Reddit Right Here”
bullish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 公開表達買入意願，為市場情緒帶來正面支撐。

bullish.title: Is Reddit Inc. (RDDT) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
bullish.reason: 華爾街分析師普遍持樂觀態度，反映出市場對其商業模式轉型與獲利能力的信心。

bullish.title: Reddit Shares Climb Wednesday: What's Happening?
bullish.reason: 股價表現優於大盤，顯示在市場波動期間具備相對抗跌性與買盤支撐。

bearish.title: Why Reddit Shares Are Trending Lower On Thursday? — Reddit (RDDT) stock drops over 8% on Thursday following insider sales by the CTO and COO amid a broader Nasdaq sell-off.
bearish.reason: 公司 CTO 與 COO 的內部人士拋售行為引發市場對股價前景的擔憂，疊加 Nasdaq 大盤回調，導致股價單日下跌超過 8 %。

bearish.title: US Jury Ruling Puts Reddit’s Engagement Model Under New Scrutiny
bearish.reason: 美國陪審團的裁決對 Reddit 的用戶參與模式提出質疑，可能影響未來廣告業務的合規性與營運模式。

bearish.title: Why Reddit (RDDT) Shares Are Sliding Today
bearish.reason: 反映股價在短期內面臨獲利回吐與市場修正壓力。

neutral.title: Meta, Kodiak Sciences, Unity Software, Lumentum Holdings And Reddit: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
neutral.reason: 僅為市場熱門股清單，主要受大盤整體下跌影響，未涉及公司基本面變動。

neutral.title: Reddit’s Bull Case for Zoom Has Nothing to Do With Video Calls
neutral.reason: 討論 Reddit 平台上的投資討論趨勢，對 RDDT 本身股價無直接影響。

neutral.title: Reddit Sentiment on SMCI Collapsed From 82 to 12 in Three Weeks as Legal Crisis Deepens
neutral.reason: 報導 Reddit 用戶對其他公司（SMCI）的情緒變化，與 RDDT 公司本身營運無關。
